title: filix aquilina
intro: Filix aquilina, also known as male fern, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. The medicinal properties of Filix aquilina lie in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve intestinal issues, making it a traditional remedy for various gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of this plant include its antiparasitic and antiseptic properties, which can help to combat internal parasites and infections. Herbal preparations of Filix aquilina can be consumed as a tea or used in tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
